scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -n gateway,auth,repo,parser,graph,search,ai,workers "cd backend/api-gateway && npm run dev" "cd backend/services/auth-service && npm run dev" "cd backend/services/repo-service && npm run dev" "cd backend/services/parser-service && npm run dev" "cd backend/services/graph-service && npm run dev" "cd backend/services/search-service && npm run dev" "cd backend/services/ai-service && npm run dev" "cd backend/workers && npm run dev"
scripts.infra:up: docker-compose up -d postgres redis neo4j qdrant typesense minio
